front.title: A YANG Network Data Model for Inventory Topology Mapping

abstract.t: This document defines a YANG data model that extends the network topology data model (RFC 8345) to map network topologies with inventories. The data model introduces the "inventory-topology" network type and augmentations for physical entity mappings and capabilities, which may be used by any overlay network topology for service provisioning validation, network maintenance, and capacity planning.
